articles.title_en: Nearly 300 Ukrainian drones strike Russian regions. Fire breaks out at fuel depot in southern Russia.
articles.lead_en: A fire broke out at a fuel depot in the village of Poltavskaya in Krasnodar Krai on June 25 after falling debris from Ukrainian drones struck the facility, the regional emergency operations center reported. No injuries were reported, according to preliminary information.
articles.title_raw: Nearly 300 Ukrainian drones strike Russian regions. Fire breaks out at fuel depot in southern Russia.
articles.lead_raw: A fire broke out at a fuel depot in the village of Poltavskaya in Krasnodar Krai on June 25 after falling debris from Ukrainian drones struck the facility, the regional emergency operations center reported. No injuries were reported, according to preliminary information.

articles.title_en: Overnight drone attacks on Russia cause casualties in Crimea, spark fire at oil depot
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drone strikes on Crimea killed two people, including a child

articles.title_en: Power outage reported in Sevastopol as Russia downs 323 Ukrainian drones overnight
articles.lead_en: Two civilians were killed each in a Ukrainian drone attack on Gorlovka in the Donetsk People’s Republic and on the Nizhny Novgorod Region

articles.title_en: One killed, 6 others injured in Ukrainian attacks on Russia’s Belgorod Region in past day
articles.lead_en: Acting Governor Alexander Shuvayev said that Ukrainian troops attacked the Belgorod Region 75 times over the past 24 hours
